_comment: 30 eval questions with reference SQL against retail_demo. Reference SQL is canonical/correct; phrasings intentionally differ from the few-shot set. See wiki/Evaluation.md.

questions.question: Какая общая выручка за 2024 год?
questions.sql: SELECT round(sum(quantity * price * (1 - discount_pct / 100))) AS revenue FROM sales WHERE toYear(sale_date) = 2024

questions.question: Сколько всего товаров в каталоге?
questions.sql: SELECT count() AS products FROM products

questions.question: Сколько сотрудников работает в компании?
questions.sql: SELECT count() AS employees FROM employees

questions.question: Какая средняя цена товара по каждому металлу?
questions.sql: SELECT metal, round(avg(price)) AS avg_price FROM products GROUP BY metal ORDER BY avg_price DESC

questions.question: Выручка по кварталам 2025 года.
questions.sql: SELECT toQuarter(sale_date) AS quarter, round(sum(quantity * price * (1 - discount_pct / 100))) AS revenue FROM sales WHERE toYear(sale_date) = 2025 GROUP BY quarter ORDER BY quarter

questions.question: Три категории товаров с наибольшей выручкой.
questions.sql: SELECT p.category AS category, round(sum(sa.quantity * sa.price * (1 - sa.discount_pct / 100))) AS revenue FROM sales AS sa INNER JOIN products AS p ON sa.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY category ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 3

questions.question: Пять лучших сотрудников по выручке за 2025 год.
questions.sql: SELECT e.full_name AS employee, round(sum(sa.quantity * sa.price * (1 - sa.discount_pct / 100))) AS revenue FROM sales AS sa INNER JOIN employees AS e ON sa.employee_id = e.employee_id WHERE toYear(sa.sale_date) = 2025 GROUP BY employee ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 5

questions.question: Сколько магазинов в каждом федеральном округе?
questions.sql: SELECT region, count() AS stores FROM stores GROUP BY region ORDER BY stores DESC

questions.question: Средний чек по городам.
questions.sql: SELECT s.city AS city, round(avg(sa.quantity * sa.price * (1 - sa.discount_pct / 100))) AS avg_check FROM sales AS sa INNER JOIN stores AS s ON sa.store_id = s.store_id GROUP BY city ORDER BY avg_check DESC

questions.question: Сравни выручку по форматам магазинов.
questions.sql: SELECT s.format AS format, round(sum(sa.quantity * sa.price * (1 - sa.discount_pct / 100))) AS revenue FROM sales AS sa INNER JOIN stores AS s ON sa.store_id = s.store_id GROUP BY format ORDER BY revenue DESC

questions.question: Как менялась выручка по годам?
questions.sql: SELECT toYear(sale_date) AS year, round(sum(quantity * price * (1 - discount_pct / 100))) AS revenue FROM sales GROUP BY year ORDER BY year

questions.question: Какая доля серебра 925 в общей выручке в процентах?
questions.sql: SELECT round(100 * sumIf(line, p.metal = 'серебро 925') / sum(line), 1) AS silver_share_pct FROM (SELECT product_id, quantity * price * (1 - discount_pct / 100) AS line FROM sales) AS sa INNER JOIN products AS p ON sa.product_id = p.product_id

questions.question: Какой магазин принёс больше всего выручки?
questions.sql: SELECT s.store_name AS store, round(sum(sa.quantity * sa.price * (1 - sa.discount_pct / 100))) AS revenue FROM sales AS sa INNER JOIN stores AS s ON sa.store_id = s.store_id GROUP BY store ORDER BY revenue DESC LIMIT 1

questions.question: Сколько продаж было в выходные дни в 2025 году?
questions.sql: SELECT count() AS sales FROM sales WHERE toYear(sale_date) = 2025 AND toDayOfWeek(sale_date) IN (6, 7)

questions.question: Какая средняя зарплата у продавцов?
questions.sql: SELECT round(avg(salary)) AS avg_salary FROM employees WHERE position LIKE '%продавец%'

questions.question: Выручка по месяцам за 2024 год.
questions.sql: SELECT toStartOfMonth(sale_date) AS month, round(sum(quantity * price * (1 - discount_pct / 100))) AS revenue FROM sales WHERE toYear(sale_date) = 2024 GROUP BY month ORDER BY month

questions.question: Топ-10 самых дорогих товаров.
questions.sql: SELECT product_name, price FROM products ORDER BY price DESC LIMIT 10

questions.question: Сколько товаров в каждой категории?
questions.sql: SELECT category, count() AS products FROM products GROUP BY category ORDER BY products DESC

questions.question: На сколько процентов выполнен годовой план за 2025 год?
questions.sql: SELECT round(100 * (SELECT sum(quantity * price * (1 - discount_pct / 100)) FROM sales WHERE toYear(sale_date) = 2025) / (SELECT sum(plan_revenue) FROM plans WHERE toYear(month) = 2025), 1) AS completion_pct

questions.question: Какие магазины перевыполнили годовой план за 2025 год?
questions.sql: SELECT s.store_name AS store, ac.actual_year AS actual, pl.plan_year AS plan FROM (SELECT store_id, sum(plan_revenue) AS plan_year FROM plans WHERE toYear(month) = 2025 GROUP BY store_id) AS pl INNER JOIN (SELECT store_id, round(sum(quantity * price * (1 - discount_pct / 100))) AS actual_year FROM sales WHERE toYear(sale_date) = 2025 GROUP BY store_id) AS ac USING (store_id) INNER JOIN stores AS s USING (store_id) WHERE ac.actual_year > pl.plan_year ORDER BY ac.actual_year / pl.plan_year DESC

questions.question: Средний размер скидки по металлам.
questions.sql: SELECT p.metal AS metal, round(avg(sa.discount_pct), 1) AS avg_discount FROM sales AS sa INNER JOIN products AS p ON sa.product_id = p.product_id GROUP BY metal ORDER BY avg_discount DESC

questions.question: Топ-10 магазинов по выручке с указанием ранга.
questions.sql: SELECT store, revenue, rank() OVER (ORDER BY revenue DESC) AS rank FROM (SELECT s.store_name AS store, round(sum(sa.quantity * sa.price * (1 - sa.discount_pct / 100))) AS revenue FROM sales AS sa INNER JOIN stores AS s ON sa.store_id = s.store_id GROUP BY store) ORDER BY rank LIMIT 10

questions.question: Накопительная выручка по месяцам за 2024 год.
questions.sql: SELECT month, revenue, sum(revenue) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS cumulative FROM (SELECT toStartOfMonth(sale_date) AS month, round(sum(quantity * price * (1 - discount_pct / 100))) AS revenue FROM sales WHERE toYear(sale_date) = 2024 GROUP BY month) ORDER BY month

questions.question: Прирост выручки год к году.
questions.sql: SELECT year, revenue, revenue - lagInFrame(revenue, 1, 0) OVER (ORDER BY year) AS yoy_change FROM (SELECT toYear(sale_date) AS year, round(sum(quantity * price * (1 - discount_pct / 100))) AS revenue FROM sales GROUP BY year) ORDER BY year

questions.question: Сколько уникальных товаров было продано в 2025 году?
questions.sql: SELECT uniqExact(product_id) AS unique_products FROM sales WHERE toYear(sale_date) = 2025

questions.question: Какая выручка у магазинов Москвы за 2025 год?
questions.sql: SELECT round(sum(sa.quantity * sa.price * (1 - sa.discount_pct / 100))) AS revenue FROM sales AS sa INNER JOIN stores AS s ON sa.store_id = s.store_id WHERE s.city = 'Москва' AND toYear(sa.sale_date) = 2025

questions.question: Пять отделов с самой высокой средней зарплатой.
questions.sql: SELECT d.department_name AS department, round(avg(e.salary)) AS avg_salary FROM employees AS e INNER JOIN departments AS d ON e.department_id = d.department_id GROUP BY department ORDER BY avg_salary DESC LIMIT 5

questions.question: Доля выручки по федеральным округам в процентах.
questions.sql: SELECT region, revenue, round(100 * revenue / sum(revenue) OVER (), 1) AS share_pct FROM (SELECT s.region AS region, sum(sa.quantity * sa.price * (1 - sa.discount_pct / 100)) AS revenue FROM sales AS sa INNER JOIN stores AS s ON sa.store_id = s.store_id GROUP BY region) ORDER BY revenue DESC

questions.question: В какие часы больше всего продаж?
questions.sql: SELECT toHour(sale_datetime) AS hour, count() AS sales FROM sales GROUP BY hour ORDER BY sales DESC

questions.question: Сколько сотрудников не привязано ни к одному магазину?
questions.sql: SELECT count() AS office_employees FROM employees WHERE store_id IS NULL
